name: pharmaverse-governance
title: Pharmaverse Semiannual Package Governance Review
description: Automated Track B semiannual review cycle for pharmaverse packages. Discovers all R packages in the pharmaverse GitHub org, resolves the reviewer's package selection, collects maintenance and quality metrics, assesses each package against governance criteria, produces a council-ready summary report, and generates per-package HTML reports.
preamble:
## Domain Context

This workflow implements the pharmaverse Package Governance Working Model v1.2 — specifically Track B (Semiannual Review Cycle). All assessments reference stable criteria IDs from the governance specification.

### Status Tags (one per package, reviewed semiannually)

- **Stable** (ST-1..ST-5): Settled API, actively maintained, quality badges active. User signal: "Safe to adopt."
- **Maturing** (MA-1..MA-5): Under active development, approved via RFC. Submission-Suitability not assessed. Must achieve Quality Reviewed within 12 months. User signal: "Assess fit carefully."
- **Watch** (WA-1..WA-4): Documented concern raised, placed by majority vote. 30-day appeal window. User signal: "Use with caution."
- **At Risk** (AR-1..AR-5): Failing standards after ≥1 Watch quarter. Remediation plan required within 1 quarter. User signal: "Avoid for new work."
- **Archived** (AV-1..AV-4): Endorsement withdrawn. Automatic (no plan by next review) or direct (2/3 supermajority). User signal: "Do not use."

### Quality Badges (three independent dimensions)

**Dimension 1 — Submission Readiness** (Stable only):
- Submission-Suitable (SS-1..SS-4): Validation artifacts, CDISC compliance, stability/versioning, regulatory context
- Submission-Caution (SC-1..SC-3): Unvalidated, dependency risks, regulatory grey areas

**Dimension 2 — Maintenance Health** (all packages):
- Actively Maintained (AM-1..AM-5): Critical issues ≤30d, non-critical ≤90d, ≥1 release/term, 2-quarter deprecation notice
- Low Maintenance (LM-1..LM-4): Response times exceed thresholds, no releases, unresponsive

**Dimension 3 — Technical Quality** (all packages):
- Quality Reviewed (QR-0..QR-4): R CMD check clean, coverage ≥70%, vignettes, maintainable code, documentation current
- Review Pending (RP-1..RP-3): Expected for Maturing; concern if long-standing for Stable

### Renewal Triggers
- RT-1: 18-month calendar limit
- RT-2: Major version release (breaking API change)
- RT-3: Council-initiated (credible concerns)

### Decision Thresholds (quorum = 60% present)
- New package approval: majority
- Watch placement/removal: majority
- At Risk: majority (after ≥1 Watch quarter)
- Archived direct: 2/3 supermajority

All medical/pharmaceutical terminology in this workflow refers to R package metadata and governance criteria — not patient data.

steps.name: Discover Pharmaverse Packages
steps.description: Call GitHub API to list all repos in the pharmaverse org. Filter to R packages. Extract maintainer name and email from DESCRIPTION files. Output: list of package names with repo metadata, maintainer info.

steps.name: Select Packages to Review
steps.description: Describe which pharmaverse packages to review this cycle. Free text, e.g. 'all packages', 'the admiral family', 'admiral, rhino', or 'all ADaM packages'. Say 'all' / 'everything' to review every discovered package. The next step resolves your description against the discovered list.

params.name: selection
params.description: Which packages to review. Say 'all packages' for every discovered pharmaverse package, or name specific packages or families.

steps.name: Resolve Package Selection
steps.description: Interpret the reviewer's free-text selection against the discovered package list and produce the filtered set of packages to collect metrics for. 'all' / 'everything' resolves to the full discovered list.

steps.name: Collect Per-Package Metrics
steps.description: For each selected package, collect governance properties, releases, issue response times, PR activity, CRAN checks, test coverage, vignette presence, documentation state, and contributor activity.

steps.name: Classify Package Governance Status
steps.description: Deterministically compute each package's status tag, quality badges, per-criterion evidence, renewal triggers, change type, confidence, and objective early warnings from the collected metrics. No LLM — identical metrics always yield the identical classification.

steps.name: Digest Classifications for Review
steps.description: Project the full classification down to a compact per-package digest (status, badges, warnings, gaps, headline metrics) for the recommendations agent. Keeps the agent's inlined input small; the report steps still read the full classification.

steps.name: Assess Recommendations
steps.description: Judgment layer: turn the deterministic classifications and raw metrics into concise council recommendations and interpretive flags. Does not compute or change status or badges.

steps.name: Generate Council Summary
steps.description: Deterministically aggregate assessments into a council-ready summary (overview, per-package detail, early warnings, action items) and an HTML presentation. Records council decisions parsed from the review comment across revision cycles.

steps.name: Review Council Summary
steps.description: Governance lead reviews the council summary. Revise with council decisions (e.g. 'admiral approved, rhino option A selected'). Approve when all action items are resolved to proceed to report generation.

steps.name: Generate Per-Package Reports
steps.description: Generate individual governance report HTML files for each reviewed package. Each report contains the package's status, quality badges, metrics summary, assessment evidence, and council decisions.
